verdict_reasoning: TGOLN2 is a trans-Golgi network resident protein involved in intracellular cargo sorting and trafficking. It localizes to the TGN and related Golgi compartments as a peripheral or integral membrane component. It functions in the secretory pathway machinery but does not itself reach the outer leaflet of the plasma membrane under any documented condition. No TM domain, GPI anchor, or mechanism for stable surface presentation is documented.
